services.name: cron-expire-polls
services.description: Daily job — mark expired polls, clean up old drafts

assumptions: Bun runtime selected for native TypeScript execution and built-in test runner (bun test)
Elysia.js framework for typed routes, onAfterHandle security headers, derive() request context
Drizzle ORM with drizzle-kit for PostgreSQL migrations — type-safe schema definitions
Upstash Redis REST API for rate limiting (sliding window) — no TCP Redis connection pooling issues with Bun HTTP mode
SSE results stream is single-instance in v1 — sticky sessions configured in render.yaml
Vote deduplication: DB UNIQUE constraint (authoritative) + Redis hot-path check (performance)
IP stored as SHA-256 hash only — raw IP never persisted (GDPR data minimization)
Email classified as PII: Confidential — no third-party email marketing in v1
Render Web Service for API + Render managed PostgreSQL + Render Cron Job for poll expiry
render.yaml declares all services — zero-downtime deploy via Render's rolling deploy
CORS allowlist loaded from CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var (comma-separated origins)
Health check: GET /health/ready pings Postgres — Render readiness probe configured
Resilience patterns applied: Upstash REST calls wrapped with p-retry (3 retries, exponential backoff + jitter)
GitHub Actions CI: lint → type-check → test → security audit → build → deploy to Render
